ui.settings.modals.resetScheduling.body: All card and note scheduling states will be reset. This can be restored from a backup.
ui.settings.modals.resetScheduling.succe: LearnKit – scheduling reset for all cards and notes
ui.settings.modals.resetAnalytics.body: All review history and statistics will be cleared. Scheduling is preserved. This can be restored from a backup.
ui.settings.modals.deleteAllFlashcards.b: All flashcards will be permanently removed from your notes and database. Restore is only possible from a vault backup.
ui.settings.modals.resetSettings.body: All settings will be restored to defaults. Cards and scheduling are not affected.
ui.settings.modals.backupComparison.note: Restoring will overwrite the current database scheduling by card anchor. It will not affect question wording or Markdown.
ui.settings.modals.restoreBackup.body: This will restore scheduling data from: {name}
ui.settings.modals.restoreBackup.noteBod: Card content ({count} cards) is unchanged. Restore does not edit markdown notes; it only restores scheduling and analytics data.
ui.settings.modals.restoreBackup.safety: Create a safety backup before restoring
ui.settings.modals.restoreBackup.success: LearnKit – scheduling data restored from backup

ui.view.home.title: LearnKit
ui.view.analytics.title: Analytics
ui.view.study.title: Study
ui.view.browser.title: Library
ui.main.notice.mustEditNote: Must be editing a note to add a flashcard
ui.anki.export.error.binaryUnavailable: Export failed — binary vault write is unavailable.
ui.cardCreator.type.label: Type
ui.cardCreator.io.ready: Ready to save and edit occlusions
ui.cardCreator.notice.imageSavedOnAdd: Image will be saved when you add the card
ui.cardCreator.notice.selectTypeFirst: Select a question type before adding
ui.cardCreator.notice.clozeRequiresToken: Cloze requires at least one {{cN::...}} token.
ui.cardCreator.notice.mcqNeedsCorrect: Multiple choice requires at least one correct option
ui.cardCreator.notice.mcqNeedsWrong: Multiple choice requires at least one wrong option
ui.cardCreator.notice.orderingMaxSteps: Ordering supports a maximum of 20 steps.
ui.settings.redirect.description: LearnKit settings live inside the plugin. Click the button below to open them.
ui.settings.appearance.userName.name: User name
ui.settings.appearance.showGreeting.name: Show greeting text
ui.settings.appearance.showGreeting.desc: Turn off to show only "home" on the home page.
Show fade-up animations when pages load.
ui.settings.audio.description: Read flashcard content aloud using your system's built-in text-to-speech. Non-Latin scripts are detected automatically and matched to the best available system voice. Latin-script text uses your chosen default voice.
ui.settings.audio.enabled.name: Enable text to speech
ui.settings.audio.enabled.desc: Enable or disable text to speech for cards that match your audio settings. If "Limit to group" is set, only that group is read aloud.
ui.settings.audio.limitToGroup.name: Limit to group
ui.settings.audio.limitToGroup.desc: Limit read-aloud to one group. Leave blank to include every card.
ui.settings.audio.autoplay.name: Autoplay audio
ui.settings.audio.autoplay.desc: Automatically read the question when a card appears, then the answer when it is revealed.
ui.settings.audio.widgetReplay.name: Read aloud + replay in widget
ui.settings.audio.widgetReplay.desc: Automatically read widget card content and show replay buttons.
ui.settings.audio.gatekeeperReplay.name: Read aloud + replay in gatekeeper
ui.settings.audio.gatekeeperReplay.desc: Automatically read gatekeeper question/answer content and show replay buttons.
ui.settings.audio.clozeAnswerMode.name: Cloze answer read mode
ui.settings.audio.clozeAnswerMode.desc: "Just the answer" reads only the cloze answer. "Full sentence" reads the full sentence with the answer filled in.
ui.settings.audio.flagRouting.useFlags.n: Use flags for language and accent
ui.settings.audio.flagRouting.useFlags.d: Let flags control language/accent during playback.
ui.settings.audio.flagRouting.guide.trai: for a guide on using flags.
ui.settings.audio.flagRouting.speakLabel: Speak language name before flag segments
Say the language name before each flag-switched segment.
ui.settings.audio.defaultVoice.name: Default voice
ui.settings.audio.defaultVoice.desc: Choose the accent and dialect for Latin-script text (English, Spanish, French, etc.). Also sets the word used for "blank" on cloze fronts.
ui.settings.audio.advanced.description: Choose language defaults for non-Latin scripts when script detection is ambiguous.
ui.settings.audio.rate.name: Speech rate
ui.settings.audio.pitch.name: Speech pitch
ui.settings.audio.pitch.desc: Pitch of speech (0.5 = low, 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = high).
ui.settings.audio.testVoice.name: Test voice
ui.settings.audio.testVoice.desc: Play a sample to hear the current voice settings.
ui.settings.audio.availableVoices.name: Available system voices
ui.settings.audio.availableVoices.desc: No system voices detected yet. Voices load asynchronously, so try reopening this tab. If it is still empty, check your operating system's speech settings.
ui.settings.audio.notice.notSupported: LearnKit – text-to-speech is not supported in this environment
ui.settings.cards.cloze.mode.name: Cloze mode
ui.settings.cards.cloze.mode.desc: Choose how cloze cards are answered: standard blanks or typed input.
ui.settings.cards.imageOcclusion.revealM: For hide-all cards: "reveal group" shows only the answer group, and "reveal all" shows every group.
ui.settings.cards.imageOcclusion.targetM: Background colour for the active mask. Leave empty to use the theme accent.
ui.settings.cards.imageOcclusion.otherMa: Background colour for context masks. Leave empty to use the theme foreground colour.
ui.settings.cards.imageOcclusion.maskIco: Icon shown on the target mask during review.
ui.settings.cards.multipleChoice.shuffle: Shuffle answer order in multiple-choice and multi-select questions.
ui.settings.cards.orderedQuestions.shuff: Shuffle step order each time the question appears.
ui.settings.study.dailyNewLimit.name: Daily new limit
ui.settings.study.dailyNewLimit.desc: Maximum new cards per day (per deck). Set 0 to disable new cards.
ui.settings.study.dailyReviewLimit.name: Daily review limit
ui.settings.study.dailyReviewLimit.desc: Maximum due cards per day (per deck). Set 0 to disable reviews.
ui.settings.study.autoAdvance.name: Auto-advance
ui.settings.study.autoAdvance.desc: Automatically marks unanswered cards as failed and advances after the timer.
ui.settings.study.autoAdvanceAfter.name: Auto-advance after
ui.settings.study.autoAdvanceAfter.desc: Delay in seconds (applies to reviewer and widget).
ui.settings.study.gradingButtons.name: Grading buttons
ui.settings.study.skipButton.name: Skip button
ui.settings.study.skipButton.desc: Show a skip button (enter). Skipped cards stay in the current session and do not change scheduling.
ui.settings.study.folderNotesAsDecks.des: A folder note studies cards from notes in that folder and its subfolders.
ui.settings.study.siblingManagement.name: Sibling card management
ui.settings.study.siblingManagement.desc: Choose how sibling cards are handled.
ui.settings.study.launchReminders.enable: Show one reminder shortly after Obsidian starts.
How many seconds to wait before showing the launch reminder.
ui.settings.study.routineReminders.enabl: Show recurring reminders while Obsidian stays open.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperPopups.enabl: Show recurring gatekeeper popups with due questions.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperPopups.onLau: Show gatekeeper once shortly after Obsidian starts.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperBehaviour.du: How many due questions to include in each popup. If fewer are due, all due cards are shown. If none are due, gatekeeper is skipped.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperBehaviour.sc: Choose whether gatekeeper blocks the full workspace or only the current tab.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperBehaviour.pa: Pause the gatekeeper timer while you are in Sprout study tabs. It resumes when you leave.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperBypass.enabl: Allow closing gatekeeper before finishing all shown questions.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperBypass.warni: Show a confirmation before closing gatekeeper early.
ui.settings.study.gatekeeperBypass.note: If fewer due questions are available, all due cards are shown. If none are due, gatekeeper is skipped.
ui.settings.scheduling.preset.name: Preset
ui.settings.scheduling.preset.desc: Apply a scheduling preset to learning steps, relearning steps, and retention. Choose custom to keep your values.
ui.settings.scheduling.requestedRetentio: Target recall probability at review time. Typical range: 0.85-0.95.
ui.settings.scheduling.reset.name: Reset scheduling
ui.settings.scheduling.reset.desc: Reset all cards to new and clear scheduling fields. Back up first if you may want to restore.
ui.settings.storage.imageOcclusionFolder: Folder where image occlusion mask images are saved.
ui.settings.storage.deleteOrphanedImages: During sync, automatically delete image occlusion files whose cards were removed from notes.
ui.settings.storage.cardAttachmentFolder: Folder where flashcard images and media are saved.
ui.settings.sync.ignoreCodeFences.name: Ignore fenced code blocks
ui.settings.sync.ignoreCodeFences.desc: Ignore cards inside fenced code blocks (``` ... ```).
ui.settings.sync.cardDelimiter.name: Card delimiter
ui.settings.sync.cardDelimiter.desc: Character used to separate fields in card markup.
ui.settings.sync.cardDelimiter.warning: Changing this will NOT migrate existing cards. Cards written with a previous delimiter will stop parsing and their scheduling data will be lost on the next sync.
ui.settings.reset.defaults.name: Reset to defaults
ui.settings.reset.defaults.desc: Reset all settings to defaults. Does not delete cards or change scheduling.
ui.settings.reset.analytics.name: Reset analytics
ui.settings.reset.analytics.desc: Clear review history, heatmaps, and statistics. Scheduling data is preserved.
ui.settings.reset.analytics.warning: This permanently deletes your analytics history. It can be restored from a backup in Settings. Make one before resetting.
ui.settings.reset.scheduling.name: Reset scheduling
ui.settings.reset.scheduling.desc: Reset all cards to new and clear card and note scheduling fields.
ui.settings.reset.scheduling.warning: This resets scheduling for every card. It can be restored from a backup in Settings. Make one before resetting.
ui.settings.reset.deleteAllFlashcards.de: Delete flashcards from notes and clear all plugin data. This cannot be undone.
ui.settings.reset.deleteAllFlashcards.wa: This permanently removes flashcards from your notes and clears plugin data. It cannot be restored from LearnKit Settings. Ensure you have a full vault backup before continuing.
ui.settings.notice.deleteAllSummary: LearnKit – deleted {cards} cards and {anchors} anchors in {files} files ({seconds}s)
ui.settings.reading.presets.comingSoon: {label} is coming in a future release.
Auto-generate dark colors from light colors.
ui.settings.reading.markdown.autoDark.de: Auto-generate dark cloze colors from light-theme colors.
ui.settings.reading.enableCardStyling.de: Turn off to use native reading view styling.
ui.settings.reading.presets.flashcards.d: Simple front/back cards with flip interaction. Question on front, answer on back.
ui.settings.reading.presets.classic.desc: Classic cards with chevrons and collapsible sections for progressive reveal.
ui.settings.reading.presets.markdown.des: Tidied markdown-style output with minimal card chrome.
ui.settings.reading.presets.custom.label: Custom
ui.settings.reading.presets.custom.desc: User-authored CSS with clean hooks for full visual control.
ui.settings.reading.livePreview.title: Live preview
ui.settings.reading.livePreview.note: These 3 demo types (Basic, Cloze, MCQ) use the same renderer as reading view and update live as you change options below.
ui.settings.reading.customCss.descriptio: Write CSS scoped to .sprout-pretty-card.sprout-macro-custom using the hooks below.
ui.settings.reading.fields.flashcardsLoc: Not editable for Flashcards. Layout is fixed to Question + Answer.
ui.settings.reading.fields.description: Choose which fields appear for the selected macro style.
ui.settings.reading.fields.title: Title
ui.settings.reading.fields.question: Question
ui.settings.reading.colours.flashcardsDe: Customize Flashcards colors for Reading view.
ui.settings.reading.colours.markdownDesc: Customize Clean markdown cloze colors for light and dark themes.
ui.settings.reading.colours.unsupportedD: Switch to Flashcards or Clean markdown to customize colors.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.sourceB: Source background color. Dark mode is generated from this.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.sourceT: Source text color. Dark mode is generated from this.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.flashca: Primary flashcard text in light mode.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.sourceC: Source cloze background. Dark mode is generated from this.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.clozeBa: Revealed cloze background in light mode.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.sourceC: Source cloze text color. Dark mode is generated from this.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.clozeTe: Revealed cloze text in light mode.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.flashca: Primary flashcard text in dark mode.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.clozeBa: Revealed cloze background in dark mode.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.clozeTe: Revealed cloze text in dark mode.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.markdow: Background colour for revealed cloze spans in light theme.
Text colour for revealed cloze spans in light theme.
Background colour for revealed cloze spans in dark theme.
Text colour for revealed cloze spans in dark theme.
ui.settings.quarantine.description: Cards that could not be parsed. Open the source note to fix them.
ui.settings.backups.retentionPolicy.name: Backup retention policy
ui.settings.backups.retentionPolicy.desc: Configure how many backups to keep per tier and how often each tier is sampled.
ui.settings.backups.recentBackups.name: Recent backups
ui.settings.backups.recentBackups.desc: Snapshots from the most recent period.
Minimum spacing between recent backups and routine auto-backups.
ui.settings.backups.dailyBackups.name: Daily backups
ui.settings.backups.dailyBackups.desc: Longer safety net for day-to-day recovery.
ui.settings.backups.weeklyBackups.name: Weekly backups
ui.settings.backups.monthlyBackups.name: Monthly backups
ui.settings.backups.sizeCapMb.name: Backup size cap (megabytes)
ui.settings.backups.sizeCapMb.desc: Prune oldest tier entries first when total backup size exceeds this cap.
ui.settings.backups.createBackup.name: Create backup
ui.settings.backups.createBackup.desc: Save a snapshot of your data (scheduling + analytics, including review history). Use this to recover if data is corrupted or lost during an update. Automatic backups follow the retention policy above.
ui.settings.backups.empty.noBackups: No scheduling data backups found. Click “Create backup now” to create one.
ui.settings.backups.actions.restore.disa: This backup failed integrity checks and cannot be restored.
ui.settings.backups.actions.restore.tool: Restore this backup and replace current scheduling data.
ui.settings.backups.notice.createUnavail: LearnKit – could not create backup (no scheduling data or adapter cannot write)
ui.settings.backups.notice.createFailed: LearnKit – failed to create scheduling data backup

ui.widget.summary.noFlashcardsInFolder: No flashcards found in this note or folder.

settings.general.interfaceLanguage.name: Interface language
settings.general.interfaceLanguage.desc: Choose the language used by LearnKit's interface. More languages will appear here as translations are added.
settings.general.translationHelp.name: Help translate LearnKit
settings.general.translationHelp.desc: LearnKit translations are crowdsourced. Contribute a language, improve wording, or help review existing translations.
settings.cards.clozeBgColor.name: Cloze background colour
settings.cards.clozeBgColor.desc: Background colour for revealed cloze pills. Leave empty to use the theme accent. Standard mode only.
settings.cards.clozeBgColor.reset: Cloze background colour reset to default
settings.cards.clozeTextColor.name: Cloze text colour
settings.cards.clozeTextColor.desc: Text colour for revealed cloze pills. Leave empty for automatic contrast. Standard mode only.
settings.cards.clozeTextColor.reset: Cloze text colour reset to default
